sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88280" key="properieli/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπερι-ελίσσω</orth>, <sense id="n88280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twist round first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
